faqs.question_zh: 为什么英国有下午茶文化？
faqs.question_en: Why does afternoon tea culture exist in the UK?
faqs.answer_zh:
【历史背景】
下午茶在19世纪逐步稳定为固定社交时段。

【社会语境】
它兼具礼仪实践与关系维护功能。

【当代变化】
如今已从精英礼仪扩展为大众文化体验。

【具体案例】
伦敦传统酒店与社区茶室并行，形成多层次选择。
faqs.answer_en:
[Historical Background]
Afternoon tea became a stable social practice during the 19th century.

[Social Context]
It combines etiquette with relationship maintenance.

[Contemporary Change]
Today it has expanded from elite ritual to broad cultural experience.

[Concrete Example]
London offers both classic hotel tea and community-oriented tea spaces.
